message:
feat(fcp-core): add CheckOutcome::is_skip predicate

Adds a third boolean accessor to fcp_core::enforcement::CheckOutcome alongside
the existing is_allow and is_deny, returning true only for the Skip { reason }
variant. Brings the predicate set to full coverage so callers can branch on
all three outcomes without pattern-matching the enum directly.

Marked #[must_use] and const fn for parity with is_allow / is_deny.

Pinning test (crates/fcp-core/tests/check_outcome_predicates.rs, new):

- check_outcome_predicates_are_mutually_exclusive walks one CheckOutcome of
  each variant (Allow, Deny { reason_code, explanation }, Skip { reason }) and
  asserts each predicate trio matches exactly one variant — Allow flips only
  is_allow, Deny flips only is_deny, Skip flips only is_skip.

This guards against future regressions where a fourth variant could be added
without extending the predicate set, or where a predicate could accidentally
return true for the wrong variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
